daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Events and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is expected, offering potential aurora visibility at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check viewing conditions and prepare for possible aurora sightings.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-18
top_events.description: Launch of a batch of 25 Starlink satellites for SpaceX's internet constellation.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for the launch.

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha | Stairway to Seven
top_events.description: Test flight for Firefly Alpha to validate key systems before Block II upgrade.
top_events.action: Follow updates for confirmation of launch schedule.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
